Class MockRoomService

java.lang.Object
at.jku.se.smarthome.service.mock.MockRoomService
All Implemented Interfaces:
RoomService
public final class MockRoomService extends Object implements RoomService
Mock Room Service providing room management functionality.

  • Method Details

    • getInstance

      public static MockRoomService getInstance()

    • resetForTesting

      public static void resetForTesting()
      Resets the singleton for unit testing. Must NOT be called from production code.

    • getRooms

      public javafx.collections.ObservableList<Room> getRooms()
      Gets all rooms.
      Specified by:
      getRooms in interface RoomService
      Returns:
      observable list of rooms

    • addRoom

      public Room addRoom(String name)
      Adds a new room.
      Specified by:
      addRoom in interface RoomService
      Parameters:
      name - display name for the new room
      Returns:
      created room instance

    • updateRoomName

      public boolean updateRoomName(String roomId, String newName)
      Updates a room name.
      Specified by:
      updateRoomName in interface RoomService
      Parameters:
      roomId - identifier of the room to update
      newName - replacement room name
      Returns:
      true when the room exists and was updated, otherwise false

    • deleteRoom

      public boolean deleteRoom(String roomId)
      Deletes a room.
      Specified by:
      deleteRoom in interface RoomService
      Parameters:
      roomId - identifier of the room to remove
      Returns:
      true when the room existed and was removed, otherwise false

    • getRoomById

      public Room getRoomById(String roomId)
      Gets a room by ID.
      Specified by:
      getRoomById in interface RoomService
      Parameters:
      roomId - identifier of the room to retrieve
      Returns:
      matching room, or null when none exists

    • getAllDevices

      public javafx.collections.ObservableList<Device> getAllDevices()
      Gets all devices across all rooms.
      Specified by:
      getAllDevices in interface RoomService
      Returns:
      observable list of all devices

    • getDeviceByName

      public Device getDeviceByName(String deviceName)
      Gets a device by its display name.
      Specified by:
      getDeviceByName in interface RoomService
      Parameters:
      deviceName - display name of the device to retrieve
      Returns:
      matching device, or null when none exists

    • getDeviceById

      public Device getDeviceById(String deviceId)
      Gets a device by its identifier.
      Specified by:
      getDeviceById in interface RoomService
      Parameters:
      deviceId - identifier of the device to retrieve
      Returns:
      matching device, or null when none exists

    • addDeviceToRoom

      public Device addDeviceToRoom(String roomId, String deviceName, String deviceType)
      Adds a device to a room.
      Specified by:
      addDeviceToRoom in interface RoomService
      Parameters:
      roomId - identifier of the target room
      deviceName - display name for the new device
      deviceType - type of the new device
      Returns:
      created device, or null when the room does not exist

    • removeDeviceFromRoom

      public boolean removeDeviceFromRoom(String roomId, String deviceId)
      Removes a device from a room.
      Specified by:
      removeDeviceFromRoom in interface RoomService
      Parameters:
      roomId - identifier of the room containing the device
      deviceId - identifier of the device to remove
      Returns:
      true when the device existed and was removed, otherwise false

    • updateDeviceState

      public boolean updateDeviceState(String deviceId, boolean state)
      Updates the on/off state of a device (in-memory only).
      Specified by:
      updateDeviceState in interface RoomService
      Parameters:
      deviceId - unique device identifier
      state - new power state
      Returns:
      true when the device existed and was updated, otherwise false

    • updateDeviceBrightness

      public boolean updateDeviceBrightness(String deviceId, int brightness)
      Updates the brightness of a device (in-memory only).
      Specified by:
      updateDeviceBrightness in interface RoomService
      Parameters:
      deviceId - unique device identifier
      brightness - brightness level 0–100
      Returns:
      true when the device existed and was updated, otherwise false

    • updateDeviceTemperature

      public boolean updateDeviceTemperature(String deviceId, double temperature)
      Updates the temperature/sensor value of a device (in-memory only).
      Specified by:
      updateDeviceTemperature in interface RoomService
      Parameters:
      deviceId - unique device identifier
      temperature - new temperature or sensor value
      Returns:
      true when the device existed and was updated, otherwise false

    • renameDevice

      public boolean renameDevice(String roomId, String deviceId, String newName)
      Renames a device.
      Specified by:
      renameDevice in interface RoomService
      Parameters:
      roomId - identifier of the room containing the device
      deviceId - identifier of the device to rename
      newName - replacement display name
      Returns:
      true when the device existed and was renamed, otherwise false
